title.rendered: Your Vote Matters: Help Travel FX Shine in the British Travel Awards

content.rendered:
The countdown is on! As you probably know, Travel FX is in the running for Best Foreign Exchange Retailer of the Year at the British Travel Awards. While we’re proud of our market-leading rates and the glowing reviews you’ve left us on Trustpilot, we’re facing a David and Goliath battle against the industry giants. This is where you come in – your vote could be the game-changer we need!

Why Your Vote is Crucial:

1. David vs. Goliath: As an online-only company, we’re up against high street behemoths like Post Office and Hays Travel. We may not have their foot traffic, but we excel in service and pricing. Your vote helps level the playing field!

2. Recognition Breeds Excellence: Winning this award would boost our industry recognition, increase our market visibility, and give our hardworking team the pat on the back they deserve. This recognition empowers us to continue offering unbeatable rates and stellar service.

3. It Only Takes a Minute: Voting is quick and easy, but the impact is enormous. Your single vote could be the one that tips the scales in our favor! Click here to vote.

4. Win While You Help Us Win: By voting, you’re automatically entered into a prize draw with an incredible array of holiday prizes. Imagine sipping cocktails on a Greek island or cruising through Scandinavia – all for taking a moment to vote!

The Prize Chest:

This year’s prizes are truly spectacular, including:
– £5,000 European villa holiday
– 8-day European Cruise for 2
– A magical trip to Lapland
– 15-night Winter Sun Cruise for 2
– £1,000 Holiday Vouchers from top travel brands
– And many more exciting getaways!

How to Vote:

Simply click here and cast your vote. It’s quick, easy, and could lead to your next dream holiday!

A Heartfelt Thank You:

To those who have already voted – thank you! Your support means the world to us. We’re proud to have such loyal and supportive customers.

At Travel FX, we believe in providing exceptional value and service. Your vote not only recognizes our efforts but also helps us continue raising the bar in the foreign exchange industry.

Remember, every vote counts. Let’s show the travel industry that top-notch service and unbeatable rates are what truly matter to savvy travelers like you!

Vote now and let’s make waves in the British Travel Awards together!

 

P.S. Don’t forget to spread the word to your friends, family and fellow travel enthusiasts. Share this blog post, share our facbook posts and share the love – The more votes we get, the stronger our voice in the industry – and the better we can serve you!

itemListElement.name: Your Vote Matters: Help Travel FX Shine in the British Travel Awards

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
